pi_items.source: Task instructions explicitly request saving the workbook as 'Product_Search_Tool.dva' and export_result.sh checks for this specific path.
Task instructions request naming the data action 'Search Product' and verifier.py checks the DVA file content for this exact string.
Task instructions specify the URL 'https://www.google.com/search?q={Product Name}'. The verifier correctly checks for the presence of 'google.com' in the DVA content.
Task instructions request anchoring the action to 'Product Name' and passing it as a parameter. verifier.py checks for this exact string in the definition.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating an Oracle Analytics Desktop workbook named 'Product_Search_Tool.dva'. The agent must configure a Data Action named 'Search Product' that performs a URL Navigation to 'google.com/search', anchored to and passing the 'Product Name' column as a parameter. The underlying data used is the standard 'Sample Order Lines' dataset, which is built-in synthetic sample data.
